verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I love You, Lord, and I lift my voice To worship You, oh my soul, rejoice Take joy, my King, in what You hear Let it be a sweet, sweet sound in Your ear.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I love You, Lord, and I lift my hands To do Your will as Your Word commands Take joy, my King, in what You see May there be a river of love flowing from me.
